LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_AncientHeatVent.descripti: Ancient ducts will regularly vent heat from an underground megastructure, dramatically raising the temperature of the surrounding area.
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_AncientHeatVent.label: ancient heat vent
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_AncientQuarry.description: This area was once mined for its natural resources, and the remains of the ancient quarry are still here.
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_AncientQuarry.label: ancient quarry
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_AncientSmokeVent.descript: This area has a number of massive exhaust vents. An ancient mechanism buried deep beneath the earth will occasionally vent large amounts of smoke, blocking out the sun for days at a time.
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_AncientSmokeVent.label: ancient smoke vent
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_AncientToxVent.descriptio: Massive toxic vents will regularly spew toxic fallout into the air. The vents connect to an ancient substructure buried deep beneath the earth.
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_AncientToxVent.label: ancient toxic vent
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_FireInfestedSettlement.de: A ruined suburb overrun by fire ants.
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_Garrison.description: A military fortification left behind after the war.
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_Garrison.label: garrison
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_Gasstation.description: An abandoned fuel stop with rusting pumps and buried tanks.
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_Gasstation.label: gas station
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_Harbor.label: harbor
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_InfestedSettlement.descri: A ruined suburb overrun by insects.
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_InfestedSettlement.label: infested settlement
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_Junkyard.description: An old dumping ground for various kinds of junk.
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_Junkyard.label: junkyard
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_LaunchSite.description: An abandoned launch complex from the old world.
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_LaunchSite.label: launch site
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_Stockpile.description: An underground bunker full of old supplies.
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_Stockpile.label: stockpile
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_Store.description: An abandoned pre-war store, still fenced and stocked with junk.
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_Store.label: store
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_Suburb.description: The scattered shell of a pre-war suburb.
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_Suburb.label: suburb
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_Uplink.description: An ancient comms uplink tied to old radio systems.
LanguageData.Arktos_Mutator_Uplink.label: uplink
